articles.title: It’s Over: The German Government Has Run Out Of Bitcoin
articles.description: Germany has relinquished all Bitcoin to its name, and Bitcoin Twitter is mocking the government for its decision.

articles.title: Germany runs out of Bitcoin after 23 days of selling
articles.description: The German government has completely divested its Bitcoin holdings after 23 days of sales, concluding the process it began in late June, according to Arkham Intelligence data. Arkham said the German government transferred the last batch of 3,846.05 BTC — valued at roughly $223.81 million — to Flow Traders and 139Po, which are likely institutional […]

articles.description: Last week’s rally in the altcoin market has led to a spike in Cardano’s (ADA) value.
